children.text: It's the second day in China for Grandpa and me. I had a good time yesterday.
children.cn: 这是爷爷和我来到中国的第二天。我昨天玩得很开心。
children.statement: David 已经在中国的第三天了。
children.explanation: 文中提到是 second day (第二天)。

children.text: The high-speed train was a surprise!
children.statement: surprise 在这里是名词，表示“令人吃惊的事”。
children.explanation: a surprise 表示一个惊喜。

children.text: It was around 15 hours from Beijing to Xi'an about 30 years ago.
children.cn: 大约30年前，从北京到西安大约需要15个小时。
children.statement: 过去从北京到西安很快。
children.explanation: 过去需要 15 个小时，并不快。

children.text: Grandpa still remembers that. He had a long journey then.
children.cn: 爷爷仍然记得那件事。他那时经历了一段漫长的旅程。
children.explanation: journey 表示一段路程或旅行。

children.text: But now it takes only a little over four hours.
children.cn: 但现在只需要四个多小时。
children.statement: take 在这里表示“花费时间”。
children.explanation: it takes + 时间，表示做某事需要花费多久时间。

children.text: We left Beijing in the morning and got to Xi'an in time for lunch.
children.cn: 我们早上离开北京，及时赶到西安吃午饭。
children.explanation: in time for sth. 表示赶上做某事的时间。

children.text: The 'Chinese hamburger' tasted very good! Grandpa said, 'It's still the same taste!'
children.cn: “中国汉堡”（肉夹馍）味道非常好！爷爷说：“还是原来的味道！”
children.explanation: same 意为“相同的”，different 才是“不同的”。

children.text: Xi'an also surprised me. It was an old city in Grandpa's photos. But now it's very different.
children.cn: 西安也让我感到惊讶。在爷爷的照片里，它是一座古老的城市。但现在它非常不同了。
children.explanation: 文中说 now it's very different (现在非常不同了)。

children.text: We are going to Chengdu tomorrow, also by the high-speed train. I can't wait!
children.cn: 我们明天要去成都，也是坐高铁。我等不及了！
children.statement: I can't wait 表示“我等不及了”，表达兴奋之情。
children.explanation: 这是一个常用习语，表示迫不及待。
